title: 48.Did You Want to Tell Me Something
filename: 48.Did You Want to Tell Me Something

lines.english: Why did the writer become very worried?
lines.chinese: 作者为什么变得非常担心？
lines.raw: Why did the writer become very worried? | 作者为什么变得非常担心？

lines.english: Dentists always ask questions when it is impossible for you to answer.
lines.chinese: 牙医总是在你无法回答的时候问问题。
lines.raw: Dentists always ask questions when it is impossible for you to answer. | 牙医总是在你无法回答的时候问问题。

lines.english: My dentist had just pulled out one of my teeth and had told me to rest for a while.
lines.chinese: 我的牙医刚刚拔掉我的一颗牙，并让我休息一会儿。
lines.raw: My dentist had just pulled out one of my teeth and had told me to rest for a while. | 我的牙医刚刚拔掉我的一颗牙，并让我休息一会儿。
I tried to say something, | 我试图说些什么，

lines.english: but my mouth was full of cotton wool.
lines.chinese: 但我的嘴里塞满了棉花。
lines.raw: but my mouth was full of cotton wool. | 但我的嘴里塞满了棉花。

lines.english: He knew I collected match boxes and asked me whether my collection was growing.
lines.chinese: 他知道我收集火柴盒，问我我的收藏是否在增加。
lines.raw: He knew I collected match boxes and asked me whether my collection was growing. | 他知道我收集火柴盒，问我我的收藏是否在增加。

lines.english: He then asked me how my brother was and whether I liked my new job in London.
lines.chinese: 然后他问我哥哥怎么样，以及我是否喜欢我在伦敦的新工作。
lines.raw: He then asked me how my brother was and whether I liked my new job in London. | 然后他问我哥哥怎么样，以及我是否喜欢我在伦敦的新工作。

lines.english: In answer to these questions I either nodded or made strange noises.
lines.chinese: 回答这些问题时，我不是点头就是发出奇怪的声音。
lines.raw: In answer to these questions I either nodded or made strange noises. | 回答这些问题时，我不是点头就是发出奇怪的声音。

lines.english: Meanwhile, my tongue was busy searching out the hole where the tooth had been.
lines.chinese: 同时，我的舌头忙着寻找牙齿拔掉后的那个洞。
lines.raw: Meanwhile, my tongue was busy searching out the hole where the tooth had been. | 同时，我的舌头忙着寻找牙齿拔掉后的那个洞。

lines.english: I suddenly felt very worried, but could not say anything.
lines.chinese: 我突然感到非常担心，却什么也说不出来。
lines.raw: I suddenly felt very worried, but could not say anything. | 我突然感到非常担心，却什么也说不出来。

lines.english: When the dentist at last removed the cotton wool from my mouth,
lines.chinese: 当牙医最终从我嘴里取出棉花时，
lines.raw: When the dentist at last removed the cotton wool from my mouth, | 当牙医最终从我嘴里取出棉花时，

lines.english: I was able to tell him that he had pulled out the wrong tooth.
lines.chinese: 我才得以告诉他他拔错了牙。
lines.raw: I was able to tell him that he had pulled out the wrong tooth. | 我才得以告诉他他拔错了牙。
